## What does this PR do?

<!-- e.g. Adds Zotero to the Writing & Reference Management section -->

- [ ] Adds a new resource
- [ ] Fixes a dead/incorrect link
- [ ] Improves a description or fixes a typo
- [ ] Other: <!-- describe -->

## Resource Details (skip if not adding a resource)

- **Name:**
- **URL:**
- **Section:**

## Checklist

- [ ] I read the [contribution guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] I searched the list and this resource is **not a duplicate**.
- [ ] The link works over HTTPS and points directly to the resource (no shorteners/affiliates).
- [ ] The entry follows the format: `- [Name](URL) - One-line description ending with a period.`
- [ ] The entry is placed in the correct section, alphabetically.
- [ ] The resource is free, open-source, or has a genuinely useful free tier.
- [ ] This PR adds **one** resource only.
